Geographic Focus: Global (Santa Monica-based)

**PARTNER DETAILS**
Name: Peter Levin
Title: Managing Director & Co-Founder
Email: peter@griffingp.com

**GAMING/AI THESIS**
Griffin Gaming Partners is one of the world's leading venture funds focused exclusively on gaming, with $1.5 billion under management. Founded in 2019 by Peter Levin, Phil Sanderson, and Nick Tuosto, they invest at the intersection of content, social platforms, and software infrastructure. Their thesis centers on backing visionary founders who are reinventing gaming through emerging technologies. They have a strong conviction in AI-driven game development, next-generation gaming infrastructure, and platforms that enable immersive, dynamic experiences. Griffin emphasizes being 'founder-friendly' and brings decades of investment, advisory, and operational experience to every partnership.

**FIT SCORE:** 90/100

- WinZO (social gaming platform, India)
